home.heroTitle: 測試Build Digital Experiences With AI, GIS and XR
home.heroLead: I architect high-performance, future-ready digital ecosystems. I connect strategy, spatial intelligence, artificial intelligence, and immersive realities to solve complex enterprise challenges.
home.aboutTitle: Turning ideas into practical digital systems.
home.aboutText: I help teams move from abstract ambition to usable digital products: strategy, architecture, prototypes, dashboards, and interactive experiences that are elegant enough for users and robust enough for operations.
home.workTitle: Digital projects built from strategy to experience.
home.toolkitText: A practical stack for prototyping, building, measuring, and scaling modern digital experiences.
home.contactTitle: Ready to architect your next digital future?
home.contactText: Bring the idea, the business challenge, or the unfinished prototype. I will help shape it into a clear, buildable digital system.

about.heroTitle: Architecting digital futures from strategy to shipped experience.
about.heroLead: I work across AI, GIS, cloud platforms, and immersive interaction to turn ambiguous business goals into clear digital systems.
about.sectionText: My work sits between business architecture and implementation. I help teams clarify what should exist, how it should behave, and which technology choices will make it maintainable after launch.

expertise.heroTitle: AI, spatial intelligence, immersive systems, and cloud-ready delivery.
expertise.heroLead: A connected capability map for teams building intelligent digital experiences.

works.heroTitle: Digital projects built from strategy to experience.
works.heroLead: A curated set of scalable platforms, immersive environments, and intelligent systems engineered for the modern enterprise.

services.heroLead: From strategy and planning to implementation and innovation, each service is structured to create practical business value.

toolkit.heroLead: A curated collection of technologies, platforms, and systems used to transform ideas into meaningful digital experiences.
toolkit.videoTitle: Motion, prototypes, and immersive product stories.
toolkit.videoText: Demo reels, product explainers, spatial walkthroughs, and visual storytelling can live in the Video area.

journal.heroTitle: Field notes for intelligent digital systems.
journal.heroLead: Short essays and thinking fragments on architecture, AI workflows, spatial interfaces, and digital futures.

video.heroLead: A curated archive of process demonstrations, workflow experiments, and kinetic architectural models. Translating complex technical concepts into accessible visual narratives.
video.ctaTitle: Want to See an Idea Become a Demo?
video.ctaText: Whether it's a complex system architecture or a new digital product concept, visual narrative clarifies intent.
